task_completion.description: Open the base rocket design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is open with a rocket design loaded, showing the component tree.

task_completion.description: Add two 6mm thick bulkheads to the middle body tube
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows two 'Bulkhead' components added inside the middle body tube section. Configuration windows may show 6mm thickness and Plywood/Birch material.

task_completion.description: Add the Altimeter Sled, Flight Computer, and Avionics Battery mass components
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows three Mass Components named 'Altimeter Sled', 'Flight Computer', and 'Avionics Battery'. Configuration windows may show their respective masses (40g, 15g, 80g).
The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is open, and a simulation has been run, displaying results such as apogee and velocity.
A save dialog or the OpenRocket window title bar shows the file being saved as 'detailed_avbay_rocket.ork' in the /home/ga/Documents/rockets/ directory.

task_completion.description: Write a technical summary report with the required metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'avbay_report.txt' containing values for total rocket mass, CG location, stability margin, and simulated apogee.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenRocket menus, component configuration windows, and simulation tabs, rather than just editing an XML file in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Report data matches actual simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the avbay_report.txt file (mass, CG, stability, apogee) correspond to the actual numbers visible in the OpenRocket interface.

integrity.description: Files are saved in the correct directories using GUI dialogs or standard text editors
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or terminal commands show the exact paths /home/ga/Documents/rockets/detailed_avbay_rocket.ork and /home/ga/Documents/exports/avbay_report.txt being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The modified rocket must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/detailed_avbay_rocket.ork'. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/avbay_report.txt'. The bulkheads must be exactly 6mm (0.006m) thick. The mass components must have the following exact masses: Altimeter Sled = 40g (0.040kg), Flight Computer = 15g (0.015kg), and Avionics Battery = 80g (0.080kg).
